    Methods in org.jscience.core.mathematics.loaders.mathml that return MathMLNodeList
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MathMLNodeList
    MathMLContentContainerImpl.getArguments()
    Returns a list of arguments.
    MathMLNodeList
    MathMLContentTokenImpl.getArguments()
    Returns a list of arguments (excluding sep elements).
    MathMLNodeList
    MathMLMathElementImpl.getArguments()
    Gets the list of arguments (child elements that are not declarations).
    MathMLNodeList
    MathMLPresentationContainerImpl.getArguments()
    Gets the list of arguments in this container.
    MathMLNodeList
    MathMLPresentationTokenImpl.getContents()
    Gets the content nodes of this token.
    MathMLNodeList
    MathMLContentContainerImpl.getDeclarations()
    Returns a list of declarations.
    MathMLNodeList
    MathMLMathElementImpl.getDeclarations()
    Gets the list of declarations within this math element.
    MathMLNodeList
    MathMLPresentationContainerImpl.getDeclarations()
    Gets the list of declarations in this container.
    MathMLNodeList
    MathMLMatrixElementImpl.getRows()
    Returns a list of all matrix rows.

    Methods in org.w3c.dom.mathml that return MathMLNodeList
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MathMLNodeList
    MathMLContainer.getArguments()
    Returns the list of all arguments (children) of this container.
    MathMLNodeList
    MathMLContentToken.getArguments()
    This interface represents the MathML MathMLContentToken element.
    MathMLNodeList
    MathMLTableRowElement.getCells()
    This interface represents the MathML MathMLTableRowElement element.
    MathMLNodeList
    MathMLPresentationToken.getContents()
    This interface represents the MathML MathMLPresentationToken element.
    MathMLNodeList
    MathMLContainer.getDeclarations()
    Returns the list of all declarations within this container.
    MathMLNodeList
    MathMLPiecewiseElement.getPieces()
    This interface represents the MathML MathMLPiecewiseElement element.
    MathMLNodeList
    MathMLMultiScriptsElement.getPrescripts()
    Returns the list of prescripts attached to the base.
    MathMLNodeList
    MathMLMatrixElement.getRows()
    Returns a list of the rows in this matrix.
    MathMLNodeList
    MathMLTableElement.getRows()
    This interface represents the MathML MathMLTableElement element.
    MathMLNodeList
    MathMLMultiScriptsElement.getScripts()
    Returns the list of postscripts (scripts) attached to the base.
